title: The Duel in the Mirror World
description: On pages 15–15, this part focuses on Unknown person #13, Katakuri, Luffy, Nami, Sanji as Luffy and Katakuri push their duel to its emotional peak while Sanji moves the cake plan toward the escape route.
scene: Luffy and Katakuri turn their fight into a battle of respect, endurance, and future sight.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Big Brooo- Thefer RRRI

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Big Brother Katakuul Ur!!!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: twig..

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's Bruceee!! Straw Haaat!! What foul tricks did you use for big brother Katakuri to...!!

dialogue.speaker: Katakuri
dialogue.text: It seems that Katakuri has been defeated!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Unbeliev- able!! Gaoh! My name is nazoms!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Y...yeah!! Since big bro Pedro sacrificed himself for you guys...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I have captured BRILEE and have been waiting for you in order to help you escape from here!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: The mysterious Saviour NAZOMS

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: I can't let you die here..!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Ah... Pekoms, you're safe...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: I see cacao Island!!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Sanji!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Luffy hasn't come out yet.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Don't get close to the fleet waiting at the coast.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'll definitely bring Luffy back over to the ship!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Does everyone have their weapons ready?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: He'll appear within the next 5 minutes....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Now... come on out...!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: A critical moment! To be continued...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Straw hat Luffy!!!

summary: This section advances the Luffy vs Katakuri storyline with 22 dialogue beats. Luffy and Katakuri push each other beyond technique, turning the fight into a test of conviction.
